systems.system_notes: Public source anchor for the Stryker GMRS modular endoprosthetic reconstruction system.

components.component_notes: Official Stryker sources describe the broader GMRS modular endoprosthetic reconstruction family.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Public endoprosthetic reconstruction product pages do not describe a dedicated tray in the current pass.
unresolved_items.reason: Tray detail should only be added from surgical technique or instrumentation sources.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction is intentionally broad and source-backed.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Public product pages do not expose a normalized product-code matrix in this pass.
